page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Quanty-cFOS.ijm is an ImageJ/Fiji tool developed to count specifically Fos/c-fos labelled cells in fixed brain slices or more generally to count cell markers in 2D fluorescent images or on Maximum Intensity Projections (MIP) in an unbiased manner.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Quanty-cFOS.ijm is an ImageJ/Fiji tool developed to count specifically Fos/c-fos labelled cells in fixed brain slices or more generally to count cell markers in 2D fluorescent images or on Maximum Intensity Projections (MIP) in an unbiased manner.
